aliasEditor.helpText: Variant names for an entity such as alternate spelling, different script, stylistic representation, acronyms, etc. Refer to the help page for more details and examples.

editionSection.clickIconToOpenAfter: icon open in a new tab, and click an item to select.
editionSection.editionGroupHelp: Group with other Editions of the same book
editionSection.editionGroupRequired: Edition Group is required — this cannot be blank. You can search for and choose an existing Edition Group, or choose to automatically create one instead.
editionSection.editionGroupTooltip: Group together different Editions of the same book.
editionSection.editionGroupTooltipExampl: For example paperback, hardcover and e-book editions.

editionSection.matchingEditionGroupsPlur: Edition Groups with the same name as this Edition already exist
editionSection.noSelectionAutoCreate: If no Edition Group is selected, a new one will be created automatically.
editionSection.releaseDateTooltip: The date this specific edition was published (not the first publication date of the work). If unsure, leave empty.
editionSection.reviewEditionGroups: Please review the Edition Groups below and select the one that corresponds to your Edition.
editionSection.searchExistingEditionGrou: Search for an existing Edition Group
editionSection.statusTooltip: Has the work been published, or is it in a draft stage?

identifierEditor.helpText: identity of the entity in other databases and services, such as ISBN, barcode, MusicBrainz ID, WikiData ID, OpenLibrary ID, etc. You can enter either the identifier only (Q2517049) or a full link (https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q2517049).

submissionSection.editNoteHelp:
An edit note will make your entries more credible. Reply to one or more of these questions in the textarea below:
- Where did you get your info from? A link is worth a thousand words.
- What kind of information did you provide? If you made any changes, what are they and why?
- Do you have any questions concerning the editing process you want to ask?
submissionSection.editNoteTooltip: Cite your sources or an explanation of your edit
submissionSection.heading: Submit Your Edit
